拿到工牌的人，会在某个深夜被强制拉进一个对应职业的诡异场景。
活下来，就能获得那个职业的一部分能力。
死了，就会变成这个职业链条上的“耗材”。
有人觉醒了鬼教师，有人觉醒了守夜人，有人觉醒了入梦师。
而主角拿到的，不是一个职业，而是一整本被血浸透的《阴职名录》。
名录第一页只写着一句话：
“活人做阴职，死人领阳寿。”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o3d1187d83dd40b1fa7cb080ddec219c0~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"Ashbell","author_id":"","book_id":"7616728960247811096","book_name":"诡职天师","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#081818","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":751,"name":"悬疑灵异","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=751&name=悬疑灵异&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":10,"name":"悬疑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=10&name=悬疑&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":100,"name":"灵异","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=100&name=灵异&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":871,"name":"第一人称","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=871&name=第一人称&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":867,"name":"捉鬼","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=867&name=捉鬼&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":537,"name":"惊悚游戏","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=537&name=惊悚游戏&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":851,"name":"规则怪谈","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=851&name=规则怪谈&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1455,"name":"风水秘术","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1455&name=风水秘术&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7616729178762658328","read_count":"2","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"119354"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"33","tags":"悬疑灵异,悬疑,灵异,第一人称,捉鬼,惊悚游戏,规则怪谈,风水秘术","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o3d1187d83dd40b1fa7cb080ddec219c0~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779185201&x-signature=zOhSFhceOxesSFxQIxDj6CSVPso%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3078063516","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_r
